narrative:
Perry Township has 1,933 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.7 percentage points.
